title: Ericoides lanatum
intro: Ericoides lanatum, also known as Lanatia lanata or Lantana lanata, is a flowering plant in the verbena family, native to tropical Asia and Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The bioactive constituents of Ericoides lanatum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenes, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat skin conditions, respiratory issues, and to promote digestion.
